4 AI bots. One subscription.

Automate your
entire business
with AI bots

LeadGen, ContentBlast, SupportDesk, and SiteBuilder Pro — four production-ready AI automation bots in one vault. No code required.

Start for free See the bots

Four bots. One vault.

Each bot targets a specific business function and runs on autopilot.

LeadGen Pro

Find & close leads on autopilot

Scrapes verified contact emails, AI-qualifies against your ICP, and sends personalized 3-email drip sequences automatically.

ContentBlast

Publish everywhere, instantly

Generates AI-written content for Twitter/X, LinkedIn, and blog — then posts it automatically. Schedule entire campaigns with cron.

SupportDesk

24/7 AI support inbox

Monitors your inbox via IMAP, generates grounded AI replies from your knowledge base, and escalates low-confidence tickets to humans.

SiteBuilder Pro

Find clients, build demos, close deals

Discovers local businesses with weak sites, generates custom demo sites with AI, sends proposals, and tracks deals in a built-in CRM.

Simple pricing

All bots included in every paid plan.
